_comment: Per-user hooks fanned in by the hook-based branch orchestrators. AGENT_HOOKS_DIR resolves to this directory. matcher is a regex on tool_name (empty = always). run is a shell command; the event payload arrives on stdin. exit 2 blocks. The Stop feedback-violation judge is built into the branch's stop.py and reads every feedback_*.md, so response-level rules need no entry here. This entry adds edit-time enforcement for rules marked apply: code.
